plugins.name: Status Reporter
plugins.capability: Summarise live JasonOS, ScarFLIX, rclone, PlatformGate and AI status.

plugins.name: ScarFLIX Mission Control
plugins.capability: Route ScarFLIX commands into safe gate, candidate model and expansion stages.

plugins.name: PlatformGate Supervisor
plugins.capability: Repair disabled detached gate tasks, clear stale state when no runner exists, and relaunch validation detached.

plugins.name: Reflective Memory
plugins.capability: Write concise local reflection notes from completed worker cycles.

plugins.name: Plugin Scaffolder
plugins.capability: Create dormant plugin manifests for future local skills without executing generated code.

plugins.name: Predictive Simulator
plugins.capability: Model the next ScarFLIX actions from current gate, source, and candidate status without publishing Plex rows.

plugins.name: Self-Evolution Planner
plugins.capability: Generate reflective engineering proposals and local memory from current JasonOS and ScarFLIX telemetry.

plugins.name: Command Centre Bridge
plugins.capability: Bridge 8805 natural language commands into worker mesh actions and status outputs.

plugins.name: Public Mirror Publisher
plugins.capability: Publish JasonOS and ScarFLIX status JSON/Markdown to the existing GitHub telemetry mirror without exposing secrets.

plugins.name: Outcome Dashboard
plugins.capability: Generate the JasonOS Prime outcome dashboard and progress tracking artifacts from local status files.

plugins.name: Fast-Track Accelerator
plugins.capability: Push short local status, prediction, candidate, and safe expansion actions every five minutes without running long validation inline.
